TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: cacay alasubu izaw ku pitu a mihecaan, cacay a bataan a bulad izaw ku sabaw pitu ademiad ayza. 107ŚĻī10śúą17śó• u sapisanga tu a libunbun nu palingt a papah ku sabisangah, u papah sicekamitulishan ku cekah kya malingtu miabit a nu miabit tu a libunhun caykadayuw a minanam a ca kiya a matin lingtusa sebatiy ku papah a miapit sasualasabiapit kya malahci ku alihunhun hamian atu a misengl tu belac a sapacumu yi a libunbunan ku belac, sisa a patelah ni ngaaysa
S.PHON: ¶a ¶aj ar~…ĺasubu izaw ku pitu a mińß…ô ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad izaw ku sabaw pitu ad…ômiad ajza. ********** u sapisaŇča tu a r~…ĺibunbun nu par~…ĺiŇčt a papańß ku sabisaŇčańß, u papańß si ¶…ôkamitur~…ĺisńßan ku ¶…ôkańß kja mar~…ĺiŇčtu miabit a nu miabit tu a r~…ĺibunńßun ¶ajkadajuw a minanam a ¶a kija a matin r~…ĺiŇčtusa s…ôbatij ku papańß a miapit sasuar~…ĺasabiapit kja mar~…ĺańß ¶i ku ar~…ĺińßunńßun ńßamian atu a mis…ôŇčr~…ĺ tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a sapa ¶umu ji a r~…ĺibunbunan ku b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, sisa a pat…ôr~…ĺańß ni Ňčaajsa
S.FORM: cacay alasubu izaw ku pitu a mihecaan, cacay a bataan a bulad izaw ku sabaw pitu ademiad ayza. 107ŚĻī10śúą17śó• u sapisanga tu a libunbun nu palingt a papah ku sabisangah, u papah sicekamitulishan ku cekah kya malingtu miabit a nu miabit tu a libunhun caykadayuw a minanam a ca kiya a matin lingtusa sebatiy ku papah a miapit sasualasabiapit kya malahci ku alihunhun hamian atu a misengl tu belac a sapacumu yi a libunbunan ku belac, sisa a patelah ni ngaaysa
S.PHON: ¶a ¶aj ar~…ĺasubu izaw ku pitu a mińß…ô ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad izaw ku sabaw pitu ad…ômiad ajza. ********** u sapisaŇča tu a r~…ĺibunbun nu par~…ĺiŇčt a papańß ku sabisaŇčańß, u papańß si ¶…ôkamitur~…ĺisńßan ku ¶…ôkańß kja mar~…ĺiŇčtu miabit a nu miabit tu a r~…ĺibunńßun ¶ajkadajuw a minanam a ¶a kija a matin r~…ĺiŇčtusa s…ôbatij ku papańß a miapit sasuar~…ĺasabiapit kja mar~…ĺańß ¶i ku ar~…ĺińßunńßun ńßamian atu a mis…ôŇčr~…ĺ tu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a sapa ¶umu ji a r~…ĺibunbunan ku b…ôr~…ĺa ¶, sisa a pat…ôr~…ĺańß ni Ňčaajsa
